diff --git a/torch7/imagenet_winners/overfeat.lua b/torch7/imagenet_winners/overfeat.lua
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..af0935f
--- /dev/null
+++ b/torch7/imagenet_winners/overfeat.lua
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+function overfeat_fast(lib)
+   local SpatialConvolution = lib[1]
+   local SpatialMaxPooling = lib[2]
+   local ReLU = lib[3]
+
+   local features = nn.Sequential()
+   features:add(SpatialConvolution(3, 96, 11, 11, 4, 4))
+   features:add(ReLU())
+   features:add(SpatialMaxPooling(2, 2, 2, 2))
+   features:add(SpatialConvolution(96, 256, 5, 5, 1, 1))
+   features:add(ReLU())
+   features:add(SpatialMaxPooling(2, 2, 2, 2))
+   features:add(SpatialConvolution(256, 512, 3, 3, 1, 1, 1, 1))
+   features:add(ReLU())
+   features:add(SpatialConvolution(512, 1024, 3, 3, 1, 1, 1, 1))
+   features:add(ReLU())
+   features:add(SpatialConvolution(1024, 1024, 3, 3, 1, 1, 1, 1))
+   features:add(ReLU())
+   -- hardcode this as cudnn. because https://github.com/torch/cunn/issues/53 . 
+   -- It's a small pooling, it is insignificant in time for the benchmarks.
+   features:add(cudnn.SpatialMaxPooling(2, 2, 2, 2)) 
+
+   local classifier = nn.Sequential()
+   classifier:add(nn.View(1024*6*6))
+   -- classifier:add(nn.Dropout(0.5))
+   classifier:add(nn.Linear(1024*6*6, 3072))
+   classifier:add(nn.Threshold(0, 1e-6))
+   -- classifier:add(nn.Dropout(0.5))
+   classifier:add(nn.Linear(3072, 4096))
+   classifier:add(nn.Threshold(0, 1e-6))
+   classifier:add(nn.Linear(4096, 1000))
+   -- classifier:add(nn.LogSoftMax())
+
+   local model = nn.Sequential()
+   model:add(features):add(classifier)
+   
+   return model,'OverFeat[fast]',{128,3,231,231}
+end
+
+return overfeat_fast
diff --git a/torch7/imagenet_winners/vgg_a.lua b/torch7/imagenet_winners/vgg_a.lua
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..8d68a3e
--- /dev/null
+++ b/torch7/imagenet_winners/vgg_a.lua
@@ -0,0 +1,55 @@
+function vgg_a(lib)
+   local SpatialConvolution = lib[1]
+   local SpatialMaxPooling = lib[2]
+   local ReLU = lib[3]
+
+   local modelType = 'A' -- on a titan black, B/D/E run out of memory even for batch-size 32
+
+   -- Create tables describing VGG configurations A, B, D, E
+   local cfg = {}
+   if modelType == 'A' then
+      cfg = {64, 'M', 128, 'M', 256, 256, 'M', 512, 512, 'M', 512, 512, 'M'}
+   elseif modelType == 'B' then
+      cfg = {64, 64, 'M', 128, 128, 'M', 256, 256, 'M', 512, 512, 'M', 512, 512, 'M'}
+   elseif modelType == 'D' then
+      cfg = {64, 64, 'M', 128, 128, 'M', 256, 256, 256, 'M', 512, 512, 512, 'M', 512, 512, 512, 'M'}
+   elseif modelType == 'E' then
+      cfg = {64, 64, 'M', 128, 128, 'M', 256, 256, 256, 256, 'M', 512, 512, 512, 512, 'M', 512, 512, 512, 512, 'M'}
+   else
+      error('Unknown model type: ' .. modelType .. ' | Please specify a modelType A or B or D or E')
+   end
+
+   local features = nn.Sequential()
+   do
+      local iChannels = 3;
+      for k,v in ipairs(cfg) do
+         if v == 'M' then
+            features:add(SpatialMaxPooling(2,2,2,2))
+         else
+            local oChannels = v;
+            local conv3 = SpatialConvolution(iChannels,oChannels,3,3,1,1,1,1);
+            features:add(conv3)
+            features:add(ReLU())
+            iChannels = oChannels;
+         end
+      end
+   end
+
+   local classifier = nn.Sequential()
+   classifier:add(nn.View(512*7*7))
+   classifier:add(nn.Linear(512*7*7, 4096))
+   classifier:add(nn.Threshold(0, 1e-6))
+   -- classifier:add(nn.Dropout(0.5))
+   classifier:add(nn.Linear(4096, 4096))
+   classifier:add(nn.Threshold(0, 1e-6))
+   -- classifier:add(nn.Dropout(0.5))
+   classifier:add(nn.Linear(4096, 1000))
+   -- classifier:add(nn.LogSoftMax())
+
+   local model = nn.Sequential()
+   model:add(features):add(classifier)
+   
+   return model,'VGG Model-' .. modelType, {32,3,224,224}
+end
+
+return vgg_a

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Make Theano benchmark do The Right Thing even without any THEANO_FLAGS
patch:
commit 59fdaa3e96318d96acd53f1b9c9a6ff6464e5088
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Tue Dec 2 17:24:11 2014 +0100

    Make Theano benchmark do The Right Thing even without any THEANO_FLAGS
---
 theano/README.md             | 2 +-
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 8 +++++++-
 2 files changed, 8 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/README.md b/theano/README.md
index 60b35fc..fcbb37e 100644
--- a/theano/README.md
+++ b/theano/README.md
@@ -38,5 +38,5 @@ sudo python setup.py install
 
 Launch the script:
 ```
-SKIP=legacy THEANO_FLAGS=floatX=float32 python pylearn2_benchmark.py
+SKIP=legacy python pylearn2_benchmark.py
 ```
diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 2577632..ff72aae 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -3,6 +3,12 @@ import sys
 import numpy as np
 import math
 
+import theano
+if not theano.config.device.startswith('gpu'):
+    import theano.sandbox.cuda
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.use('gpu')
+theano.config.floatX = 'float32'
+
 try:
     import theano.misc.pycuda_init
     import pycuda.driver
@@ -197,7 +203,7 @@ for run in runs:
     print ''
     print 'CONFIG: input =', ni, 'x', iw, 'x', ih, '* ker =', ni, 'x', no, 'x', kw, 'x', kh, '( bs =', bs, ', stride =', dw, ')'
     ops = 2  # ops per point
-    mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode().including('gpu')
+    mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
 
     # benchmark Theano legacy convolution
     # Mimic THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_excluding=conv_gemm:conv_dnn

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Theano benchmark: Removed two lines resetting the compile mode
patch:
commit f56cbca13fd5855cb97bdbf73f82a4a00d56b697
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Mon Dec 1 11:37:58 2014 +0100

    Theano benchmark: Removed two lines resetting the compile mode
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 2 --
 1 file changed, 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index b837245..2577632 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -236,8 +236,6 @@ for run in runs:
 
     # benchmark cudnn, convolution with kernel flipping
     if hasattr(theano.sandbox.cuda, 'dnn') and 'dnn' not in skip_tests:
-        mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()

author: Jan Schlüter
patch:
commit b655b5a55c56fd0d7a82b150849561f4dc3fd376
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Fri Nov 21 13:01:47 2014 +0100

    Add meta-optimizer to Theano benchmark
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 7 +++++++

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py

                              sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX,
                              mode.excluding('conv_gemm', 'conv_dnn'))
 
+    # benchmark Theano meta-optimizer
+    # Mimic THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_meta

     if 'fft' not in skip_tests:

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Allow the graphs to be printed by setting the environment variable PRINT_GRAPH=1
patch:
commit 9d6ffacbed900222063feba246869ff6cb7d04d4
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Fri Nov 21 12:16:11 2014 +0100

    Allow the graphs to be printed by setting the environment variable PRINT_GRAPH=1
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 16 +++++++++++++---
 1 file changed, 13 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 417b275..2488b63 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -114,6 +114,13 @@ def time_run(fn):
             times.append((time.time() - start) / number)
     return min(times)
 
+def print_graph(fn):
+    if int(os.environ.get('PRINT_GRAPH', 0)):
+		# debugprint of graph (in blue text)
+		print '\033[1;34m'
+		theano.printing.debugprint(fn)
+		print '\033[1;m'
+
 def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode=None):
     # benchmark fprop
     try:
@@ -123,8 +130,9 @@ def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode=Non
                                 mode=mode,
                                 name=name + " fprop")
         tm = time_run(fprop)
-        del fprop
         print '{: <50} ==> {: <13} ==> {: >7}'.format(name, 'fprop', int(tm*1000))
+        print_graph(fprop)
+        del fprop
     except Exception, e:
         print name, 'fprop: FAILED', str(e).split('\n', 1)[0]
 
@@ -137,8 +145,9 @@ def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode=Non
                                 mode=mode,
                                 name=name + " bprop inputs")
         tm = time_run(bprop)
-        del bprop
         print '{: <50} ==> {: <13} ==> {: >7}'.format(name, 'bprop inputs', int(tm*1000))
+        print_graph(bprop)
+        del bprop
     except Exception, e:
         print name, 'bprop inputs: FAILED', str(e).split('\n', 1)[0]
 
@@ -150,8 +159,9 @@ def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode=Non
                                 mode=mode,
                                 name=name + " bprop weights")
         tm = time_run(bprop)
-        del bprop
         print '{: <50} ==> {: <13} ==> {: >7}'.format(name, 'bprop weights', int(tm*1000))
+        print_graph(bprop)
+        del bprop
     except Exception, e:
         print name, 'bprop weights: FAILED', str(e).split('\n', 1)[0]
     print ''

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Allow each benchmark to be disabled individually via a SKIP environment variable
patch:
commit 0b5237c93e7a2bdd2b808b24fc676ab983056a14
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Fri Nov 21 12:15:13 2014 +0100

    Allow each benchmark to be disabled individually via a SKIP environment variable
---
 theano/README.md             | 11 +++++++++--
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 23 ++++++++++++++---------
 2 files changed, 23 insertions(+), 11 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/README.md b/theano/README.md
index c2c7df2..60b35fc 100644
--- a/theano/README.md
+++ b/theano/README.md
@@ -2,8 +2,9 @@ Install Theano:
 ```
 git clone git://github.com/Theano/Theano.git
 cd Theano
-git pull https://github.com/abergeron/Theano.git dnn
 sudo python setup.py develop
+# To install into your home directory instead:
+# python setup.py develop --prefix=~/.local
 ```
 
 Install pylearn2:
@@ -11,6 +12,8 @@ Install pylearn2:
 git clone git://github.com/lisa-lab/pylearn2.git
 cd pylearn2
 sudo python setup.py develop
+# To install into your home directory instead:
+# python setup.py develop --prefix=~/.local
 ```
 
 Install pycuda:
@@ -20,6 +23,8 @@ tar -xvf pycuda-2013.1.1.tar.gz
 cd pycuda-2013.1.1
 ./configure.py
 sudo python setup.py install
+# To install into your home directory instead:
+# python setup.py install --user
 ```
 
 Install scikits.cuda:
@@ -27,9 +32,11 @@ Install scikits.cuda:
 git clone https://github.com/lebedov/scikits.cuda.git
 cd scikits.cuda
 sudo python setup.py install
+# To install into your home directory instead:
+# python setup.py install --user
 ```
 
 Launch the script:
 ```
-SKIP_LEGACY=1 THEANO_FLAGS=mode=FAST_RUN,device=gpu,floatX=float32 python pylearn2_benchmark.py
+SKIP=legacy THEANO_FLAGS=floatX=float32 python pylearn2_benchmark.py
 ```
diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 5024930..417b275 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -177,6 +177,9 @@ if len(sys.argv) > 1:
     # allow specifying custom configurations on command line (e.g., i3x80x15,k32x3x7,b256)
     runs.extend([parse_custom_config(r) for r in sys.argv[1:] if r[0] == 'i'])
 
+# allow specifying benchmarks to skip via a SKIP environment variable
+skip_tests = os.environ.get("SKIP", '').lower().split(',')
+
 for run in runs:
     # params for run:
     # (input channels, output channels, kernel width, kernel height, batchsize, image width, image height, horizontal stride, vertical stride)
@@ -202,19 +205,20 @@ for run in runs:
     Y = theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d(X, sharedW, input_shape, filter_shape, subsample=(dh,dw))
     gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
     gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
-    if int(os.environ.get("SKIP_LEGACY", 0)) == 0:
+    if 'legacy' not in skip_tests:
         benchmark_three_ways('theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d',
                              sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX,
                              mode.excluding('conv_gemm', 'conv_dnn'))
 
     # benchmark Theano FFT convolution
     # Mimic THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_fft
-    benchmark_three_ways('theano.sandbox.cuda.fftconv.conv2d_fft',
-                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX,
-                         mode.including('conv_fft'))
+    if 'fft' not in skip_tests:
+        benchmark_three_ways('theano.sandbox.cuda.fftconv.conv2d_fft',
+                             sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX,
+                             mode.including('conv_fft'))
 
     # benchmark cudnn, convolution with kernel flipping
-    if hasattr(theano.sandbox.cuda, 'dnn'):

author: Sergey Zagoruyko
patch:
commit e9c05e4d152198182674c843f0c75eb7db6cfa7c
Author: Sergey Zagoruyko <sergey.zagoruyko@imagine.enpc.fr>
Date:   Thu Sep 25 20:26:12 2014 +0200

    bloking test
---
 test/multigpu.lua | 90 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 1 file changed, 90 insertions(+)

diff --git a/test/multigpu.lua b/test/multigpu.lua
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..811f87c
--- /dev/null
+++ b/test/multigpu.lua
@@ -0,0 +1,90 @@
+require 'cutorch'
+require 'nn'
+require 'cunn'
+require 'cudnn'
+require 'ccn2'
+
+cutorch.setDevice(4)
+
+fSize = {3, 96, 128, 128, 384}
+inputSize = {3, 64, 64}
+batchSize = 128
+
+nettype = 'cudnn'
+
+if nettype == 'cudnn' then
+  model = nn.Sequential()
+  model:add(cudnn.SpatialConvolution(fSize[1], fSize[2], 9, 9))
+  model:add(cudnn.ReLU())
+  model:add(cudnn.SpatialMaxPooling(2,2,2,2))
+  model:add(cudnn.SpatialConvolution(fSize[2], fSize[3], 5, 5))
+  model:add(cudnn.ReLU())
+  model:add(cudnn.SpatialMaxPooling(2,2,2,2))
+  model:add(cudnn.SpatialConvolution(fSize[3], fSize[4], 4, 4))
+  model:add(cudnn.ReLU())
+  model:add(cudnn.SpatialConvolution(fSize[4], fSize[5], 3, 3))
+  model:add(cudnn.ReLU())
+  model:add(cudnn.SpatialMaxPooling(2,2,2,2))
+  model:add(cudnn.SpatialConvolution(fSize[5], fSize[5], 3, 3))
+  --model:add(nn.Reshape(fSize[5]))
+  --model:add(nn.Linear(fSize[5],1))
+elseif nettype == 'ccn2' then
+  model = nn.Sequential()
+  model:add(nn.Transpose({1,4},{1,3},{1,2}))
+  model:add(ccn2.SpatialConvolution(fSize[1], fSize[2], 9))
+  model:add(nn.ReLU())
+  model:add(ccn2.SpatialMaxPooling(2,2))
+  model:add(ccn2.SpatialConvolution(fSize[2], fSize[3], 5))
+  model:add(nn.ReLU())
+  model:add(ccn2.SpatialMaxPooling(2,2))
+  model:add(ccn2.SpatialConvolution(fSize[3], fSize[4], 5))
+  model:add(nn.ReLU())
+  model:add(ccn2.SpatialConvolution(fSize[4], fSize[5], 3))
+  model:add(nn.ReLU())
+  model:add(ccn2.SpatialMaxPooling(2,2))
+  model:add(ccn2.SpatialConvolution(fSize[5], fSize[5], 3))
+elseif nettype == 'MM' then
+  model = nn.Sequential()
+  model:add(nn.SpatialConvolutionMM(fSize[1], fSize[2], 9, 9))
+  model:add(nn.ReLU())
+  model:add(nn.SpatialMaxPooling(2,2,2,2))
+  model:add(nn.SpatialConvolutionMM(fSize[2], fSize[3], 5, 5))
+  model:add(nn.ReLU())
+  model:add(nn.SpatialMaxPooling(2,2,2,2))
+  model:add(nn.SpatialConvolutionMM(fSize[3], fSize[4], 4, 4))
+  model:add(nn.ReLU())
+  model:add(nn.SpatialConvolutionMM(fSize[4], fSize[5], 3, 3))
+  model:add(nn.ReLU())
+  model:add(nn.SpatialMaxPooling(2,2,2,2))
+  model:add(nn.SpatialConvolutionMM(fSize[5], fSize[5], 3, 3))
+  model:add(nn.Reshape(fSize[5]))
+end
+
+model = model:cuda()
+
+input = torch.rand(batchSize, inputSize[1], inputSize[2], inputSize[3]):cuda()
+
+-- first run
+--print(model:forward(input):size())
+output = model:forward(input)
+
+a = torch.Timer()
+output = model:forward(input)
+print('FORWARD free run time:', a:time().real)
+
+cutorch.synchronize()
+a:reset()
+output = model:forward(input)
+cutorch.synchronize()
+print('FORWARD sync time:', a:time().real)
+
+cutorch.synchronize()
+a:reset()
+model:backward(input, output)
+print('BACKWARD free run time:', a:time().real)
+
+cutorch.synchronize()
+a:reset()
+model:backward(input, output)
+cutorch.synchronize()
+print('BACKWARD sync time:', a:time().real)

author: Frederic
message: Give fct name to help profiling.
patch:
commit 37afe9eedd05c821c88302c182e75002d64cf77c
Author: Frederic <nouiz@nouiz.org>
Date:   Wed Sep 24 09:00:02 2014 -0400

    Give fct name to help profiling.
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 9 ++++++---
 1 file changed, 6 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index f0e75bd..76c8446 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -117,7 +117,8 @@ def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode=Non
         fprop = theano.function([], [],
                                 givens=[(X, sharedX)],
                                 updates=[(sharedY, Y)],
-                                mode=mode)
+                                mode=mode,
+                                name=name + " fprop")
         tm = time_run(fprop)
         del fprop
         print '{: <70} ==> {: <15} ==> {: >10}'.format(name, 'fprop', math.floor(tm*1000))
@@ -130,7 +131,8 @@ def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode=Non
                                 # the nvidia wrapper need this (in fact could be optional for subsample==(1, 1)
                                 givens=[(X, sharedX)],
                                 updates=[(sharedX, gX)],
-                                mode=mode)
+                                mode=mode,
+                                name=name + " bprop inputs")
         tm = time_run(bprop)
         del bprop
         print '{: <70} ==> {: <15} ==> {: >10}'.format(name, 'bprop inputs', math.floor(tm*1000))
@@ -142,7 +144,8 @@ def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode=Non
         bprop = theano.function([], [],
                                 givens=[(X, sharedX)],
                                 updates=[(sharedW, gW)],
-                                mode=mode)
+                                mode=mode,
+                                name=name + " bprop weights")
         tm = time_run(bprop)
         del bprop
         print '{: <70} ==> {: <15} ==> {: >10}'.format(name, 'bprop weights', math.floor(tm*1000))

author: Frederic
patch:
commit c911bfdba3f8a7ec86718fb81b81f7cd43cba02a
Author: Frederic <nouiz@nouiz.org>
Date:   Wed Sep 24 08:49:51 2014 -0400

author: Frederic
patch:
commit 661c125a9552ae3c09131544f975c3fc7dfa3ad6
Author: Frederic <nouiz@nouiz.org>
Date:   Tue Sep 23 09:40:50 2014 -0400

    Better variable name
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 13 +++++++++----
 1 file changed, 9 insertions(+), 4 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index a5f960d..9ba378a 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -182,10 +182,15 @@ for run in runs:
     # benchmark Theano standard convolution
     input_shape = (bs, ni, ih, iw)
     filter_shape = (no, ni, kh, kw)
-    sharedX = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*input_shape).astype('float32'))
-    sharedY = theano.shared(np.random.randn(bs, no, (ih-kh)/dh+1, (iw-kw)/dw+1).astype('float32'))
-    sharedW = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*filter_shape).astype('float32'))
-    X = theano.tensor.tensor4()
+    try:
+        sharedX = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*input_shape).astype('float32'), name='sharedX')
+        sharedY = theano.shared(np.random.randn(bs, no, (ih-kh)/dh+1, (iw-kw)/dw+1).astype('float32'), name='sharedY')
+        sharedW = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*filter_shape).astype('float32'), name='sharedW')
+    except MemoryError, e:
+        print "SKIPPING config due to the memory error bellow"
+        print e
+        continue
+    X = theano.tensor.tensor4('X')
     Y = theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d(X, sharedW, input_shape, filter_shape, subsample=(dh,dw))
     gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
     gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})

author: Frederic
patch:
commit 4e8c7b5d80e0de3b1fa8d215a170d12d97e20257
Author: Frederic <nouiz@nouiz.org>
Date:   Tue Sep 23 09:40:29 2014 -0400

    Add manual Theano cudnn profiling.
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 43 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++----------
 1 file changed, 33 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index a110628..a5f960d 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -127,6 +127,8 @@ def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode=Non
     # benchmark bprop wrt input
     try:
         bprop = theano.function([], [],
+                                # the nvidia wrapper need this (in fact could be optional for subsample==(1, 1)
+                                givens=[(X, sharedX)],
                                 updates=[(sharedX, gX)],
                                 mode=mode)
         tm = time_run(bprop)
@@ -207,17 +209,38 @@ for run in runs:
 
     # benchmark caffe-like gemm convolution
     # Mimic Theano flag THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_gemm
-    mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
-    mode = mode.including('conv_gemm')
-    benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, auto) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
-                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode)
+    if int(os.environ.get("SKIP_GEMM", 0)) == 0:
+        mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
+        mode = mode.including('conv_gemm')
+        benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, auto) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
+                             sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode)
 
-    # benchmark caffe-like gemm convolution again, directly, w/o kernel flipping
-    Y = theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM(subsample=(dh,dw))(gpu_contiguous(X), gpu_contiguous(sharedW))
-    gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
-    gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
-    benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, manual) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
-                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode)
+        # benchmark caffe-like gemm convolution again, directly, w/o kernel flipping
+        Y = theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM(subsample=(dh, dw))(
+            gpu_contiguous(X), gpu_contiguous(sharedW))
+        gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+        gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+        benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, manual) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
+                             sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX)
+
+    # benchmark nvidia convolution directly
+    if hasattr(theano.sandbox.cuda, 'dnn'):
+        Y = theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn.dnn_conv(X, sharedW, 'valid',
+                                             subsample=(dh, dw))
+        gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+        gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+        benchmark_three_ways(
+            '(experimental, manual conv) theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn.GpuDnnConv',
+            sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX)
+        # without flipping
+        Y = theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn.dnn_conv(X, sharedW, 'valid',
+                                             subsample=(dh, dw),
+                                             conv_mode='cross')
+        gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+        gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+        benchmark_three_ways(
+            '(experimental, manual corr) theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn.GpuDnnConv',
+            sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX)
 
     del sharedX
     del sharedY

patch:
commit 6974b2122ace4859f1b4e10435bc11d2b1258fe5
Author: Soumith Chintala <soumith@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon Sep 15 13:17:37 2014 -0400

    vgg configurations in torch
---
 torch7/vgg-benchmark.lua | 173 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 torch7/vgg.bench         | 156 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 329 insertions(+)

diff --git a/torch7/vgg-benchmark.lua b/torch7/vgg-benchmark.lua
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..483b50b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/torch7/vgg-benchmark.lua
@@ -0,0 +1,173 @@
+require 'sys'
+require 'cunn'
+require 'ccn2'
+require 'cudnn'
+
+print('Running on device: ' .. cutorch.getDeviceProperties(cutorch.getDevice()).name)
+
+steps = 4 -- nb of steps in loop to average perf
+
+runs = {
+   {
+      -- first layer
+      ni = 3,
+      no = 64,
+      kw = 3,
+      kh = 3,
+      iw = 224,
+      ih = 224,
+      bs = 64,
+      dw = 1,
+      dh = 1,
+   },
+   {
+      ni = 64,
+      no = 64,
+      kw = 3,
+      kh = 3,
+      iw = 224,
+      ih = 224,
+      bs = 64,
+      dw = 1,
+      dh = 1,
+   },
+   {
+      ni = 64,
+      no = 128,
+      kw = 3,
+      kh = 3,
+      iw = 112,
+      ih = 112,
+      bs = 64,
+      dw = 1,
+      dh = 1,
+   },
+   {
+      ni = 128,
+      no = 128,
+      kw = 3,
+      kh = 3,
+      iw = 112,
+      ih = 112,
+      bs = 64,
+      dw = 1,
+      dh = 1,
+   },
+   {
+      ni = 128,
+      no = 256,
+      kw = 3,
+      kh = 3,
+      iw = 56,
+      ih = 56,
+      bs = 64,
+      dw = 1,
+      dh = 1,
+   },
+
+   {
+      ni = 256,
+      no = 256,
+      kw = 3,
+      kh = 3,
+      iw = 56,
+      ih = 56,
+      bs = 64,
+      dw = 1,
+      dh = 1,
+   },
+   {
+      ni = 256,
+      no = 512,
+      kw = 3,
+      kh = 3,
+      iw = 28,
+      ih = 28,
+      bs = 64,
+      dw = 1,
+      dh = 1,
+   },
+   {
+      ni = 512,
+      no = 512,
+      kw = 3,
+      kh = 3,
+      iw = 28,
+      ih = 28,
+      bs = 64,
+      dw = 1,
+      dh = 1,
+   },
+   {
+      ni = 512,
+      no = 512,
+      kw = 3,
+      kh = 3,
+      iw = 14,
+      ih = 14,
+      bs = 64,
+      dw = 1,
+      dh = 1,
+   }
+}
+
+
+for i,run in ipairs(runs) do
+   -- params for run:
+   local ni,no,kw,kh,bs,iw,ih,dw,dh = run.ni,run.no,run.kw,run.kh,run.bs,run.iw,run.ih,run.dw,run.dh
+   print('')
+   print('CONFIG: input = ' .. ni..'x'..iw..'x'..ih..' * ker = ' .. ni..'x'..no..'x'..kw..'x'..kh .. ' (bs = '..bs..', stride = ' .. dw .. ')')
+   local mods = {}
+   mods[1] = cudnn.SpatialConvolution(ni,no,kw,kh,dw,dh, 1, 1):cuda()
+   mods[2] = nn.SpatialConvolutionMM(ni,no,kw,kh,dw,dh):cuda(); mods[2].padding = 1
+   mods[3] = ccn2.SpatialConvolution(ni,no,kw,dw):cuda()
+   for j=1,#mods do   
+      local tmf, tmbi, tmbg
+      collectgarbage()
+      if torch.typename(mods[j]) == 'ccn2.SpatialConvolution' then
+         i1 = torch.randn(ni, ih, iw, bs):cuda();
+      else
+         i1 = torch.randn(bs, ni, ih, iw):cuda()
+      end         
+      collectgarbage()
+      local o1 = mods[j]:forward(i1)
+      cutorch.synchronize()
+      collectgarbage()
+      sys.tic()
+      for t = 1,steps do
+         o1 = mods[j]:updateOutput(i1)
+      end
+      cutorch.synchronize()
+      tmf = sys.toc()/steps
+      print(string.format("%-30s %25s %10.2f", torch.typename(mods[j]), ':updateOutput():', tmf*1000))
+
+      cutorch.synchronize()
+      collectgarbage()
+      sys.tic()
+      for t = 1,steps do
+         mods[j]:updateGradInput(i1, o1)
+      end
+      cutorch.synchronize()
+      tmbi = sys.toc()/steps
+      print(string.format("%-30s %25s %10.2f", torch.typename(mods[j]), ':updateGradInput():', tmbi*1000))
+
+      cutorch.synchronize()
+      collectgarbage()
+      sys.tic()
+      local ok = 1
+      for t = 1,steps do
+         ok = pcall(function() mods[j]:accGradParameters(i1, o1) end)
+      end
+      cutorch.synchronize()
+      tmbg = sys.toc()/steps
+      if not ok then
+         print(string.format("%-30s %25s %s", torch.typename(mods[j]), ':accGradParameters():', 'FAILED!'))
+      else
+         print(string.format("%-30s %25s %10.2f", torch.typename(mods[j]), ':accGradParameters():', tmbi*1000))
+      end
+      print(string.format("%-30s %25s %10.2f", torch.typename(mods[j]), ':TOTAL:', (tmf+tmbi+tmbg)*1000))
+      print()
+   end
+end
+
+print('')

+      tmbg = sys.toc()/steps
       if not ok then
-         print(torch.typename(mods[j]) .. ':accGradParameters():       ' .. 'FAILED!')
+         print(string.format("%-30s %25s %s", torch.typename(mods[j]), ':accGradParameters():', 'FAILED!'))
       else
-         print(torch.typename(mods[j]) .. ':accGradParameters():       ' .. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+         print(string.format("%-30s %25s %10.2f", torch.typename(mods[j]), ':accGradParameters():', tmbi*1000))
       end
+      print(string.format("%-30s %25s %10.2f", torch.typename(mods[j]), ':TOTAL:', (tmf+tmbi+tmbg)*1000))
+      print()
    end
 end

     # benchmark Theano standard convolution

     gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})

         benchmark_three_ways('theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d',
-                             sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops)
+                             sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX)
 
     # benchmark Theano FFT convolution

     mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()

-                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)

     # benchmark caffe-like gemm convolution again, directly, w/o kernel flipping

     gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
     gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
     benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, manual) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
-                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)
+                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, mode)
 
     del sharedX
     del sharedY

         benchmark_three_ways('pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet(partial_sum=%r)' % partial_sum,

author: Jan Schlüter
patch:
commit 5e78daf588a7eebbf35a3242045cd8e5036590b2
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Thu Sep 11 18:37:39 2014 +0200

    fixed Theano cuDNN benchmark
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 19 ++++++++++++-------
 1 file changed, 12 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 1f2268a..d54f33b 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -10,6 +10,11 @@ except ImportError:
     pycuda = None
 import theano
 
+try:
+	import theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn
+except ImportError:
+	print "Note: cuDNN not available"
+
 try:
     from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.filter_acts import FilterActs
 except ImportError:
@@ -194,6 +199,13 @@ for run in runs:
     benchmark_three_ways('(experimental) theano.sandbox.cuda.fftconv.conv2d_fft',
                          sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)
 
+    # benchmark cudnn, convolution with kernel flipping
+    if hasattr(theano.sandbox.cuda, 'dnn'):
+        mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
+        mode = mode.including('cudnn')
+        benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, auto) theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn.GpuDnnConv',
+	                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)
+
     # benchmark caffe-like gemm convolution
     # Mimic Theano flag THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_gemm
     mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
@@ -208,13 +220,6 @@ for run in runs:
     benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, manual) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
                          sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)
 
-    # benchmark cudnn, convolution with kernel flipping
-    mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
-    import theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn
-    mode = mode.including('cudnn')
-    benchmark_three_ways('(experimental auto) theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn.GpuDnnConv',
-                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)
-
     del sharedX
     del sharedY
     del sharedW

author: Frederic
patch:
commit 8668e76433396bbd0e8b20e51a69c7928e644fde
Author: Frederic <nouiz@nouiz.org>
Date:   Thu Sep 11 09:27:47 2014 -0400

    benchmark cudnn back-end.
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 7 +++++++
 1 file changed, 7 insertions(+)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 450f62c..1f2268a 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -208,6 +208,13 @@ for run in runs:
     benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, manual) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
                          sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)
 
+    # benchmark cudnn, convolution with kernel flipping
+    mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
+    import theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn
+    mode = mode.including('cudnn')
+    benchmark_three_ways('(experimental auto) theano.sandbox.cuda.dnn.GpuDnnConv',
+                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)
+
     del sharedX
     del sharedY
     del sharedW

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Theano benchmark: Compare two settings of partial_sum for cuda-convnet
patch:
commit c71d1f94237a36d3c24497988e5fb2db9cdbf805
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Mon Sep 1 17:32:17 2014 +0200

    Theano benchmark: Compare two settings of partial_sum for cuda-convnet
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 13 ++++++-------
 1 file changed, 6 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index dc3d8ac..450f62c 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -224,13 +224,12 @@ for run in runs:
     sharedW = theano.shared(np.random.randn(ni, kh, kw, no).astype('float32'))
     contiguous_input = gpu_contiguous(sharedX)
     contiguous_filters = gpu_contiguous(sharedW)
-    Y = FilterActs()(contiguous_input, contiguous_filters)
-    gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
-    #from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.weight_acts import WeightActs
-    #gW = WeightActs()(contiguous_input, gpu_contiguous(sharedY), sharedW.shape)[0]  # constructed by hand, results in the same graph
-    gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedX, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
-    benchmark_three_ways('pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet',
-                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops)
+    for partial_sum in (None, 1):
+        Y = FilterActs(partial_sum=partial_sum)(contiguous_input, contiguous_filters)
+        gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+        gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedX, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+        benchmark_three_ways('pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet(partial_sum=%r)' % partial_sum,
+                             sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops)
 
     del sharedX
     del sharedY

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Theano benchmark: Compare automatic and manual insertion of GpuCorrMM
patch:
commit d1d1ab4a718eeee86c712d367aed8632ceb2b481
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Mon Sep 1 17:30:56 2014 +0200

    Theano benchmark: Compare automatic and manual insertion of GpuCorrMM
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 9 ++++++++-
 1 file changed, 8 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index e25a143..dc3d8ac 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -198,7 +198,14 @@ for run in runs:
     # Mimic Theano flag THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_gemm
     mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
     mode = mode.including('conv_gemm')
-    benchmark_three_ways('(experimental) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.CorrMM',
+    benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, auto) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
+                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)
+
+    # benchmark caffe-like gemm convolution again, directly, w/o kernel flipping
+    Y = theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM(subsample=(dh,dw))(gpu_contiguous(X), gpu_contiguous(sharedW))
+    gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+    gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+    benchmark_three_ways('(experimental, manual) theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
                          sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)
 
     del sharedX

-number = 1   # nb of steps in loop to average over
-repeat = 10  # nb of trials to pick the minimum of

 runs = [
    {
@@ -102,7 +102,7 @@ def time_run(fn):
                 fn()
             theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
             times.append((time.time() - start) / number)
-    return sum(times)/repeat
+    return min(times)
 
 def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode=None):
     # benchmark fprop

author: Soumith Chintala
message: pylearn2 averaging 10 runs, not minimum of 10 runs! :-/
patch:
commit 229d52e02084245da991d883cc99b8376796cb20
Author: Soumith Chintala <soumith@gmail.com>
Date:   Mon Aug 25 23:57:26 2014 -0400

    pylearn2 averaging 10 runs, not minimum of 10 runs! :-/
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 6 +++---
 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index b25d56a..b16e2c7 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -19,8 +19,8 @@ else:
     from theano.sandbox.cuda.basic_ops import gpu_contiguous
 
 
-number = 2  # nb of steps in loop to average over
-repeat = 2  # nb of trials to pick the minimum of
+number = 1   # nb of steps in loop to average over
+repeat = 10  # nb of trials to pick the minimum of
 
 runs = [
    {
@@ -102,7 +102,7 @@ def time_run(fn):
                 fn()
             theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
             times.append((time.time() - start) / number)
-    return min(times)
+    return sum(times)/repeat
 
 def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode=None):
     # benchmark fprop

author: Soumith Chintala
message: separated caffe into with gradInput and without
patch:
commit 3d9d8b18978ca0ff6c28538466db94237627ef14
Author: Soumith Chintala <soumith@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Aug 22 12:34:46 2014 -0400

    separated caffe into with gradInput and without
---
 caffe/README.md                                 |  16 +-
 caffe/output.log                                | 250 ------------------------
 caffe/output_forceGradInput.log                 | 250 ++++++++++++++++++++++++
 caffe/output_noGradInput.log                    | 245 +++++++++++++++++++++++
 caffe/{ => proto_forceGradInput}/conv1.prototxt |   0
 caffe/{ => proto_forceGradInput}/conv2.prototxt |   0
 caffe/{ => proto_forceGradInput}/conv3.prototxt |   0
 caffe/{ => proto_forceGradInput}/conv4.prototxt |   0
 caffe/{ => proto_forceGradInput}/conv5.prototxt |   0
 caffe/proto_noGradInput/conv1.prototxt          |  25 +++
 caffe/proto_noGradInput/conv2.prototxt          |  25 +++
 caffe/proto_noGradInput/conv3.prototxt          |  25 +++
 caffe/proto_noGradInput/conv4.prototxt          |  25 +++
 caffe/proto_noGradInput/conv5.prototxt          |  25 +++
 14 files changed, 631 insertions(+), 255 deletions(-)

diff --git a/caffe/README.md b/caffe/README.md
index c008c53..1a4e17c 100644
--- a/caffe/README.md
+++ b/caffe/README.md
@@ -5,9 +5,15 @@ bash install.sh
 
 Run the benchmark using:
 ```bash
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv1.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv2.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv3.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv4.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv5.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_noGradInput/conv1.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_noGradInput.log 2>&1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_noGradInput/conv2.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_noGradInput.log 2>&1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_noGradInput/conv3.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_noGradInput.log 2>&1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_noGradInput/conv4.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_noGradInput.log 2>&1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_noGradInput/conv5.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_noGradInput.log 2>&1
+
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_forceGradInput/conv1.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_forceGradInput.log 2>&1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_forceGradInput/conv2.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_forceGradInput.log 2>&1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_forceGradInput/conv3.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_forceGradInput.log 2>&1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_forceGradInput/conv4.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_forceGradInput.log 2>&1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=proto_forceGradInput/conv5.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1 >>output_forceGradInput.log 2>&1
 ```

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Undo 24baa9f, allow to skip Theano legacy benchmark with environment variable SKIP_LEGACY=1
patch:
commit 054caac2e1a37ef6457a2cb28f69d723f30533f1
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Fri Aug 22 15:22:27 2014 +0200

    Undo 24baa9f, allow to skip Theano legacy benchmark with environment variable SKIP_LEGACY=1
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 12 +++++-------
 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 75c3eba..b25d56a 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
+import os
 import sys
 import numpy as np
 try:
@@ -179,12 +180,12 @@ for run in runs:
     sharedY = theano.shared(np.random.randn(bs, no, (ih-kh)/dh+1, (iw-kw)/dw+1).astype('float32'))
     sharedW = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*filter_shape).astype('float32'))
     X = theano.tensor.tensor4()
-    Y = theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM(subsample=(dh,dw))(X, sharedW)
-    # Y = theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d(X, sharedW, input_shape, filter_shape, subsample=(dh,dw))
+    Y = theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d(X, sharedW, input_shape, filter_shape, subsample=(dh,dw))
     gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
     gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
-    benchmark_three_ways('theano.sandbox.cuda.blas.GpuCorrMM',
-                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops)
+    if int(os.environ.get("SKIP_LEGACY", 0)) == 0:
+        benchmark_three_ways('theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d',
+                             sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops)
 
     # benchmark Theano FFT convolution
     # Mimic Theano flag THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_fft_valid:conv_fft_full
@@ -227,6 +228,3 @@ for run in runs:
     del sharedX
     del sharedY
     del sharedW
-
-if pycuda:
-    pycuda.driver.Context.pop()

author: Soumith Chintala
patch:
commit 2536011c98b62753162eaafee26e362dacc18bc3
Author: Soumith Chintala <soumith@gmail.com>
Date:   Wed Aug 20 01:17:53 2014 -0400

    new caffe instructions
---
 caffe/README.md | 10 +++++-----
 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)

diff --git a/caffe/README.md b/caffe/README.md
index 71ecae2..f205148 100644
--- a/caffe/README.md
+++ b/caffe/README.md
@@ -5,9 +5,9 @@ bash install.sh
 
 Run the benchmark using:
 ```bash
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe.bin speedtest --net_proto_file=conv.prototxt --run_iterations=1 --speedtest_with_gpu --logtostderr=1
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe.bin speedtest --net_proto_file=conv2.prototxt --run_iterations=1 --speedtest_with_gpu --logtostderr=1
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe.bin speedtest --net_proto_file=conv3.prototxt --run_iterations=1 --speedtest_with_gpu --logtostderr=1
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe.bin speedtest --net_proto_file=conv4.prototxt --run_iterations=1 --speedtest_with_gpu --logtostderr=1
-./caffe/build/tools/caffe.bin speedtest --net_proto_file=conv5.prototxt --run_iterations=1 --speedtest_with_gpu --logtostderr=1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv2.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv3.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv4.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
+./caffe/build/tools/caffe time --model=conv5.prototxt --iterations=1 --gpu 0 --logtostderr=1
 ```

patch:
commit 24baa9fd7b080f247a2e6f8094093924efb4b259
Author: Soumith Chintala <soumith@gmail.com>
Date:   Wed Aug 20 00:38:48 2014 -0400

    removed annoyingly slow legacy conv2d from theano
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 5 +++--
 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 4493e2b..75c3eba 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -179,10 +179,11 @@ for run in runs:
     sharedY = theano.shared(np.random.randn(bs, no, (ih-kh)/dh+1, (iw-kw)/dw+1).astype('float32'))
     sharedW = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*filter_shape).astype('float32'))

     gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})

author: Soumith Chintala
patch:
commit 9c74886778c4d3ee4ae7dea913f36cda06ac9f6b
Author: Soumith Chintala <soumith@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Aug 15 14:21:35 2014 -0400

    adding convnetjs benchmark thanks to @karpathy
---
 convnet.js/README.md    |  6 ++++++
 convnet.js/benchmark.js | 21 +++++++++++++++++++++
 2 files changed, 27 insertions(+)

diff --git a/convnet.js/README.md b/convnet.js/README.md
index e69de29..24ba8f5 100644
--- a/convnet.js/README.md
+++ b/convnet.js/README.md
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+sudo apt-get install nodejs
+
+git clone https://github.com/karpathy/convnetjs.git
+
+node benchmark.js
+
diff --git a/convnet.js/benchmark.js b/convnet.js/benchmark.js
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e0d3b55
--- /dev/null
+++ b/convnet.js/benchmark.js
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+var convnetjs = require("./convnetjs/build/convnet.js");
+
+// L1 Conv Layer definition
+var opt = { in_sx:128, in_sy:128, in_depth:3, sx:11, filters:96, stride: 1, pad: 0 };
+var layer = new convnetjs.ConvLayer(opt);
+
+// create a random input volume
+var x = new convnetjs.Vol(128, 128, 3);
+
+// run it through batch_size number of times
+var batch_size = 128;
+var dtall = 0;
+for(var i=0;i<batch_size;i++) { // batch of 128
+  var t0 = +new Date();
+  layer.forward(x); // forward
+  var t1 = +new Date();
+  var dt = t1 - t0;
+  dtall += dt;
+  console.log(i + ' took ' + dt + 'ms. Estimating full batch to take ' + (dtall/(i+1))*batch_size + 'ms');
+}
+console.log('total: ' + dtall + 'ms');

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Theano benchmark: Allow specifying custom configurations to benchmark on command line
patch:
commit f2fe2cfae33df8f30c2e476e8e47b31d83928b1d
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Wed Aug 13 13:16:00 2014 +0200

    Theano benchmark: Allow specifying custom configurations to benchmark on command line
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 19 ++++++++++++++++++-
 1 file changed, 18 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index a0d957c..4493e2b 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -139,9 +139,26 @@ def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, m
     except Exception:
         print name, 'bprop inputs: FAILED'
 
+def parse_custom_config(s):
+    # parses a custom configuration string of the format:
+    # iAxBxC,kDxExF,bG,sHxJ where A: input channels, B: input width, C: input height,
+    # D: output channels, E: kernel width, F: kernel height, G: batchsize,
+    # H: horizontal stride, J: vertical stride (with G, H, J being optional)
+    run = {'bs': 128, 'dw': 1, 'dh': 1}
+    defs = {'i': ['ni', 'iw', 'ih'],
+            'k': ['no', 'kw', 'kh'],
+            'b': ['bs'],
+            's': ['dw', 'dh']}
+    for part in s.split(','):
+        p, args = part[0], map(int, part[1:].split('x'))
+        run.update(zip(defs[p], args))
+    return run
+
 if len(sys.argv) > 1:
     # allow specifying the runs on command line, 1-indexed (i.e., 1 2 5)
-    runs = [runs[int(r) - 1] for r in sys.argv[1:]]
+    runs = [runs[int(r) - 1] for r in sys.argv[1:] if r[0] != 'i']
+    # allow specifying custom configurations on command line (e.g., i3x80x15,k32x3x7,b256)
+    runs.extend([parse_custom_config(r) for r in sys.argv[1:] if r[0] == 'i'])
 
 for run in runs:
     # params for run:

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Theano benchmark: Time via CUDA events if possible
patch:
commit 534a68f6bb0d382e551fa352a155dfc964fc34ee
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Mon Aug 11 12:53:25 2014 +0200

    Theano benchmark: Time via CUDA events if possible
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 34 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++-------
 1 file changed, 27 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 3304ee6..a0d957c 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -1,6 +1,12 @@
 import sys
-import time
 import numpy as np
+try:
+    import theano.misc.pycuda_init
+    import pycuda.driver
+except ImportError:
+    print "Note: pycuda not available, no timing via CUDA events possible"
+    import time
+    pycuda = None
 import theano
 
 try:
@@ -76,13 +82,25 @@ runs = [
 def time_run(fn):
     times = []
     fn()  # warm-up call, not timed
-    for _ in range(repeat):
-        theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
-        start = time.time()
-        for _ in range(number):
-            fn()
+    if pycuda:
         theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
-        times.append((time.time() - start) / number)
+        start = pycuda.driver.Event()
+        end = pycuda.driver.Event()
+        for _ in range(repeat):
+            start.record()
+            for _ in range(number):
+                fn()
+            end.record()
+            end.synchronize()
+            times.append(start.time_till(end) / 1e3 / number)
+    else:
+        for _ in range(repeat):
+            theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+            start = time.time()
+            for _ in range(number):
+                fn()
+            theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+            times.append((time.time() - start) / number)
     return min(times)
 
 def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode=None):
@@ -192,3 +210,5 @@ for run in runs:
     del sharedY
     del sharedW
 
+if pycuda:
+    pycuda.driver.Context.pop()

patch:
commit 1a1572f6cf7c610ae20e439518a980529e06fa09
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>

---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 233 +++++++++++++++----------------------------
 1 file changed, 79 insertions(+), 154 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 3cc6e32..3e2f825 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -1,17 +1,18 @@
 import time
-import gc
 import numpy as np
 import theano
-import pylearn2
 
-import theano.tensor as T
+try:
+    from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.filter_acts import FilterActs
+except ImportError:
+    FilterActs = None
+    print "Note: pylearn2's cuda-convnet wrapper not available"
+else:
+    from theano.sandbox.cuda.basic_ops import gpu_contiguous
 
-from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.filter_acts import FilterActs
-from theano.sandbox.cuda.basic_ops import gpu_contiguous
 
-
-steps = 4  # nb of steps in loop to average perf
-ops = 2  # ops per point
+number = 2  # nb of steps in loop to average over
+repeat = 2  # nb of trials to pick the minimum of
 
 runs = [
    {
@@ -71,194 +72,118 @@ runs = [
    }
 ]
 
-for i in range(5):
-    run = runs[i]
+def time_run(fn):
+    times = []
+    fn()  # warm-up call, not timed
+    for _ in range(repeat):
+        theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+        start = time.time()
+        for _ in range(number):
+            fn()
+        theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+        times.append((time.time() - start) / number)
+    return min(times)
+
+def benchmark_three_ways(name, sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode=None):
+    # benchmark fprop
+    try:
+        fprop = theano.function([], [],
+                                givens=[(X, sharedX)],
+                                updates=[(sharedY, Y)],
+                                mode=mode)
+        tm = time_run(fprop)
+        del fprop
+        print name, 'fprop:', (flops[0] / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    except Exception:
+        print name, 'fprop: FAILED'
+
+    # benchmark bprop wrt weights
+    try:
+        bprop = theano.function([], [],
+                                givens=[(X, sharedX)],
+                                updates=[(sharedW, gW)],
+                                mode=mode)
+        tm = time_run(bprop)
+        del bprop
+        print name, 'bprop weights:', (flops[1] / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    except Exception:
+        print name, 'bprop weights: FAILED'
+
+    # benchmark bprop wrt input
+    try:
+        bprop = theano.function([], [],
+                                updates=[(sharedX, gX)],
+                                mode=mode)
+        tm = time_run(bprop)
+        del bprop
+        print name, 'bprop inputs:', (flops[2] / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    except Exception:
+        print name, 'bprop inputs: FAILED'
+
+for run in runs:
     # params for run:
     # (input channels, output channels, kernel width, kernel height, batchsize, image width, image height, horizontal stride, vertical stride)
     ni, no, kw, kh, bs, iw, ih, dw, dh = run['ni'], run['no'], run['kw'], run['kh'], run['bs'], run['iw'], run['ih'], run['dw'], run['dh']
     print ''
     print 'CONFIG: input =', ni, 'x', iw, 'x', ih, '* ker =', ni, 'x', no, 'x', kw, 'x', kh, '( bs =', bs, ', stride =', dw, ')'
+    ops = 2  # ops per point
     fprop_flops = ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) / dw/dh * bs * ops  # flops of a valid convolution of X with W
     bprop_W_flops = 0 #no*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1)*ops*ni*kw*kh*no/dw/dh  # TODO: check if that's the flops of a valid convolution of X with Y
     bprop_X_flops = 0 #fprop_flops  # TODO: check if that's the flops of a full convolution of Y with W
+    flops = (fprop_flops, bprop_W_flops, bprop_X_flops)
 
+    # benchmark Theano standard convolution
     input_shape = (bs, ni, ih, iw)
     filter_shape = (no, ni, kh, kw)
     sharedX = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*input_shape).astype('float32'))
     sharedY = theano.shared(np.random.randn(bs, no, (ih-kh)/dh+1, (iw-kw)/dw+1).astype('float32'))
     sharedW = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*filter_shape).astype('float32'))
-
     X = theano.tensor.tensor4()
     Y = theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d(X, sharedW, input_shape, filter_shape, subsample=(dh,dw))
     gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
     gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+    benchmark_three_ways('theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d',
+                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops)
 
-    # benchmark Theano standard convolution, fprop
-    fprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedY, Y)], on_unused_input='ignore')
-
-    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
-    start = time.time()

-

-    bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedW, gW), (sharedX, gX)], on_unused_input='ignore')

     # Mimic Theano flag THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_fft_valid:conv_fft_full
     mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
     mode = mode.including('conv_fft_valid', 'conv_fft_full')
+    benchmark_three_ways('(experimental) theano.sandbox.cuda.fftconv.conv2d_fft',
+                         sharedX, sharedY, sharedW, X, Y, gW, gX, flops, mode)

+./caffe/build/tools/caffe.bin speedtest --net_proto_file=conv3.prototxt --run_iterations=1 --speedtest_with_gpu --logtostderr=1

+./caffe/build/tools/caffe.bin speedtest --net_proto_file=conv5.prototxt --run_iterations=1 --speedtest_with_gpu --logtostderr=1

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Theano benchmark now uses theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d directly
patch:
commit 7900f910950e8aa4ceb90617c9ac383dc810e7a1
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Sun Aug 3 13:47:27 2014 +0200

    Theano benchmark now uses theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d directly
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 35 +++++++++++++----------------------
 1 file changed, 13 insertions(+), 22 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index d0f36b4..3cc6e32 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -6,9 +6,6 @@ import pylearn2
 
 import theano.tensor as T
 
-from pylearn2.models.mlp import ConvElemwise, ConvNonlinearity, MLP
-from pylearn2.space import Conv2DSpace
-
 from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.filter_acts import FilterActs
 from theano.sandbox.cuda.basic_ops import gpu_contiguous
 
@@ -85,19 +82,14 @@ for i in range(5):
     bprop_W_flops = 0 #no*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1)*ops*ni*kw*kh*no/dw/dh  # TODO: check if that's the flops of a valid convolution of X with Y
     bprop_X_flops = 0 #fprop_flops  # TODO: check if that's the flops of a full convolution of Y with W
 
-    conv = MLP(
-       batch_size=bs,
-       input_space=Conv2DSpace((ih, iw), num_channels=ni, axes=('b', 'c', 0, 1)),
-       layers=[ConvElemwise(no, (kw, kh), 'ConvTest', ConvNonlinearity(), irange=0.1)]
-    )
-
-    inputBatch = np.random.randn(bs, ni, ih, iw)
-    sharedX = theano.shared(inputBatch.astype('float32'))
+    input_shape = (bs, ni, ih, iw)
+    filter_shape = (no, ni, kh, kw)
+    sharedX = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*input_shape).astype('float32'))
     sharedY = theano.shared(np.random.randn(bs, no, (ih-kh)/dh+1, (iw-kw)/dw+1).astype('float32'))
-    sharedW = conv.layers[0].transformer.get_params()[0]
+    sharedW = theano.shared(np.random.randn(*filter_shape).astype('float32'))
 
     X = theano.tensor.tensor4()
-    Y = conv.fprop(X)
+    Y = theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d(X, sharedW, input_shape, filter_shape, subsample=(dh,dw))
     gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
     gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
 
@@ -112,7 +104,7 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del fprop
-    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise fprop:', (fprop_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print 'theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d fprop:', (fprop_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
     # benchmark Theano standard convolution, bprop wrt weights
     bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedW, gW)], on_unused_input='ignore')
@@ -125,7 +117,7 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del bprop
-    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop weights:', (bprop_W_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print 'theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d bprop weights:', (bprop_W_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
     # benchmark Theano standard convolution, bprop wrt input
     bprop = theano.function([], [], updates=[(sharedX, gX)], on_unused_input='ignore')
@@ -138,7 +130,7 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del bprop
-    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop inputs:', (bprop_X_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print 'theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d bprop inputs:', (bprop_X_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
     # benchmark Theano standard convolution, bprop wrt weights and input
     bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedW, gW), (sharedX, gX)], on_unused_input='ignore')
@@ -151,7 +143,7 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del bprop
-    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop both:', ((bprop_W_flops + bprop_X_flops) / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print 'theano.tensor.nnet.conv.conv2d bprop both:', ((bprop_W_flops + bprop_X_flops) / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
 
     # Mimic Theano flag THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_fft_valid:conv_fft_full
@@ -171,7 +163,7 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del fprop
-    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise fprop:', (fprop_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print '(experimental) theano.sandbox.cuda.fftconv.conv2d_fft fprop:', (fprop_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
     # benchmark Theano FFT convolution, bprop wrt weights
     bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)],
@@ -186,7 +178,7 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del bprop
-    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop weights:', (bprop_W_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print '(experimental) theano.sandbox.cuda.fftconv.conv2d_fft bprop weights:', (bprop_W_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
     # benchmark Theano FFT convolution, bprop wrt inputs
     bprop = theano.function([], [],
@@ -201,15 +193,14 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del bprop
-    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop inputs:', (bprop_X_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print '(experimental) theano.sandbox.cuda.fftconv.conv2d_fft bprop inputs:', (bprop_X_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
     del sharedX
     del sharedY
     del sharedW
-    del conv
 
 
-    ### pylearn2 work-around for using cuda-convnet (http://benanne.github.io/2014/04/03/faster-convolutions-in-theano.html) ###
+    ### pylearn2 wrapper for using cuda-convnet (http://benanne.github.io/2014/04/03/faster-convolutions-in-theano.html) ###
 
     #(channels, rows, columns, batch_size)
     inputBatch = np.random.randn(ni, ih, iw, bs)

patch:
commit 6fee95ba151d5a17a8dcb69c6cadde50ebaccc9d
Author: Soumith Chintala <soumith@gmail.com>
Date:   Fri Aug 1 11:36:28 2014 -0400

    new torch benchmark script with :backward
---
 torch7/benchmark.lua | 88 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++------
 1 file changed, 78 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)

diff --git a/torch7/benchmark.lua b/torch7/benchmark.lua
index bc828cd..07aeb07 100644
--- a/torch7/benchmark.lua
+++ b/torch7/benchmark.lua
@@ -1,16 +1,13 @@
-require 'nn'
 require 'sys'
 require 'cunn'
 require 'ccn2'
- 
-torch.manualSeed(1)
-torch.setdefaulttensortype('torch.FloatTensor')
- 
- 
+
 steps = 4 -- nb of steps in loop to average perf
 ops = 2 -- ops per point
 
 runs = {
+   
+   --   Disabled because of texture memory limits bug!
    {
       -- first layer
       ni = 3,
@@ -88,7 +85,7 @@ for i,run in ipairs(runs) do
 
    o1 = n1:forward(i1)
    o2 = n2:forward(i2)
-   o3 = n2:forward(i3)
+   o3 = n3:forward(i3)
 
    cutorch.synchronize()
    sys.tic()
@@ -97,26 +94,97 @@ for i,run in ipairs(runs) do
    end
    cutorch.synchronize()
    tm = sys.toc()/steps
-   print('nn.SpatialConvolutionCUDA: ' .. (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) /dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9) .. ' GFLOP/s (tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+   print('cuda-convnet1:updateOutput():        '.. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
 
    cutorch.synchronize()
+   collectgarbage()
    sys.tic()
    for t = 1,steps do
       o2 = n2:updateOutput(i2)
    end
    cutorch.synchronize()
    tm = sys.toc()/steps
-   print('nn.SpatialConvolutionMM: ' .. (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) /dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9) .. ' GFLOP/s (tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+   print('SpatialConvolutionMM:updateOutput(): ' .. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
 
    cutorch.synchronize()
+   collectgarbage()
    sys.tic()
    for t = 1,steps do
       o3 = n3:updateOutput(i3)
    end
    cutorch.synchronize()
    tm = sys.toc()/steps
-   print('ccn2.SpatialConvolution: ' .. (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) /dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9) .. ' GFLOP/s (tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+   print('cuda-convnet2:updateOutput():        ' .. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+
+   print ('')
+
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   collectgarbage()
+   sys.tic()
+   for t = 1,steps do
+      n1:updateGradInput(i1, o1)
+   end
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   tm = sys.toc()/steps
+   print('cuda-convnet1:updateGradInput():        ' .. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
 
+   cutorch.synchronize()
    collectgarbage()
+   sys.tic()
+   for t = 1,steps do
+      n2:updateGradInput(i2, o2)
+   end
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   tm = sys.toc()/steps
+   print('SpatialConvolutionMM:updateGradInput(): ' .. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   collectgarbage()
+   sys.tic()
+   for t = 1,steps do
+      n3:updateGradInput(i3, o3)
+   end
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   tm = sys.toc()/steps
+   print('cuda-convnet2:updateGradInput():        ' .. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+
+   print ('')
+
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   collectgarbage()
+   sys.tic()
+   for t = 1,steps do
+      n1:accGradParameters(i1, o1)
+   end
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   tm = sys.toc()/steps
+   print('cuda-convnet1:accGradParameters():       ' .. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   collectgarbage()
+   sys.tic()
+   for t = 1,steps do
+      n2:accGradParameters(i2, o2)
+   end
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   tm = sys.toc()/steps
+   print('SpatialConvoltionMM:accGradParameters(): ' .. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   collectgarbage()
+   sys.tic()
+   local ok
+   for t = 1,steps do
+      ok = pcall(function() n3:accGradParameters(i3, o3) end)
+   end
+   cutorch.synchronize()
+   tm = sys.toc()/steps
+   if not ok then
+      print('cuda-convnet2:accGradParameters():       ' .. 'FAILED!')
+   else
+      print('cuda-convnet2:accGradParameters():       ' .. '(tm = ' .. tm .. ')')
+   end
+
 end
 
+print('')

author: Jan Schlüter
message: Added backpropagation wrt. inputs to Theano benchmarks
patch:
commit ce0cb7ccf74d724e40ae4b215d11a1bd721c8bb3
Author: Jan Schlüter <jan.schlueter@ofai.at>
Date:   Fri Aug 1 16:17:18 2014 +0200

    Added backpropagation wrt. inputs to Theano benchmarks
---
 theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py | 86 +++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++-------
 1 file changed, 73 insertions(+), 13 deletions(-)

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 34399fb..d0f36b4 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
+++ b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
@@ -10,7 +10,6 @@ from pylearn2.models.mlp import ConvElemwise, ConvNonlinearity, MLP
 from pylearn2.space import Conv2DSpace
 
 from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.filter_acts import FilterActs
-from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.weight_acts import WeightActs
 from theano.sandbox.cuda.basic_ops import gpu_contiguous
 
 
@@ -78,9 +77,13 @@ runs = [
 for i in range(5):
     run = runs[i]
     # params for run:
+    # (input channels, output channels, kernel width, kernel height, batchsize, image width, image height, horizontal stride, vertical stride)
     ni, no, kw, kh, bs, iw, ih, dw, dh = run['ni'], run['no'], run['kw'], run['kh'], run['bs'], run['iw'], run['ih'], run['dw'], run['dh']
     print ''
     print 'CONFIG: input =', ni, 'x', iw, 'x', ih, '* ker =', ni, 'x', no, 'x', kw, 'x', kh, '( bs =', bs, ', stride =', dw, ')'
+    fprop_flops = ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) / dw/dh * bs * ops  # flops of a valid convolution of X with W
+    bprop_W_flops = 0 #no*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1)*ops*ni*kw*kh*no/dw/dh  # TODO: check if that's the flops of a valid convolution of X with Y
+    bprop_X_flops = 0 #fprop_flops  # TODO: check if that's the flops of a full convolution of Y with W
 
     conv = MLP(
        batch_size=bs,
@@ -96,8 +99,9 @@ for i in range(5):
     X = theano.tensor.tensor4()
     Y = conv.fprop(X)
     gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+    gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=X, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
 
-    # benchmark fprop Theano standard convolution
+    # benchmark Theano standard convolution, fprop
     fprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedY, Y)], on_unused_input='ignore')
 
     theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
@@ -108,9 +112,9 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del fprop
-    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise fprop:', (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) / dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise fprop:', (fprop_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
-    # benchmark bprop Theano standard convolution
+    # benchmark Theano standard convolution, bprop wrt weights
     bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedW, gW)], on_unused_input='ignore')
 
     theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
@@ -121,14 +125,40 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del bprop
-    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop:', (0000 / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'  # TODO: GFLOP/s
+    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop weights:', (bprop_W_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+
+    # benchmark Theano standard convolution, bprop wrt input
+    bprop = theano.function([], [], updates=[(sharedX, gX)], on_unused_input='ignore')
+
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    start = time.time()
+    for i in range(steps):
+        bprop()
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
+
+    del bprop
+    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop inputs:', (bprop_X_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+
+    # benchmark Theano standard convolution, bprop wrt weights and input
+    bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedW, gW), (sharedX, gX)], on_unused_input='ignore')
+
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    start = time.time()
+    for i in range(steps):
+        bprop()
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
+
+    del bprop
+    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop both:', ((bprop_W_flops + bprop_X_flops) / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
 
     # Mimic Theano flag THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_fft_valid:conv_fft_full
     mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
     mode = mode.including('conv_fft_valid', 'conv_fft_full')
 
-    # benchmark fprop Theano FFT convolution
+    # benchmark Theano FFT convolution, fprop
     fprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)],
                             updates=[(sharedY, Y)],
                             on_unused_input='ignore', mode=mode)
@@ -141,9 +171,9 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del fprop
-    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise fprop:', (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) / dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise fprop:', (fprop_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
-    # benchmark bprop Theano FFT convolution
+    # benchmark Theano FFT convolution, bprop wrt weights
     bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)],
                             updates=[(sharedW, gW)],
                             on_unused_input='ignore', mode=mode)
@@ -156,7 +186,22 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del bprop
-    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop:', (0000 / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'  # TODO: GFLOP/s
+    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop weights:', (bprop_W_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+
+    # benchmark Theano FFT convolution, bprop wrt inputs
+    bprop = theano.function([], [],
+                            updates=[(sharedX, gX)],
+                            on_unused_input='ignore', mode=mode)
+
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    start = time.time()
+    for i in range(steps):
+        bprop()
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
+
+    del bprop
+    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop inputs:', (bprop_X_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
     del sharedX
     del sharedY
@@ -178,9 +223,11 @@ for i in range(5):
     contiguous_filters = gpu_contiguous(sharedW)
     Y = conv_op(contiguous_input, contiguous_filters)
     gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+    #from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.weight_acts import WeightActs
     #gW = WeightActs()(contiguous_input, gpu_contiguous(sharedY), sharedW.shape)[0]  # constructed by hand, results in the same graph
+    gX = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedX, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
 
-    # benchmark fprop cuda-convnet convolution
+    # benchmark cuda-convnet convolution, fprop
     fprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedY, Y)], on_unused_input='ignore')
 
     theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
@@ -191,9 +238,9 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del fprop
-    print 'pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet fprop:', (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) / dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    print 'pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet fprop:', (fprop_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
-    # benchmark bprop cuda-convnet convolution
+    # benchmark cuda-convnet convolution, bprop wrt weights
     bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedW, gW)], on_unused_input='ignore')
 
     theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
@@ -204,7 +251,20 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del bprop
-    print 'pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet bprop:', (0000 / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'  # TODO: GFLOP/s
+    print 'pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet bprop weights:', (bprop_W_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+
+    # benchmark cuda-convnet convolution, bprop wrt inputs
+    bprop = theano.function([], [], updates=[(sharedX, gX)], on_unused_input='ignore')
+
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    start = time.time()
+    for i in range(steps):
+        bprop()
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
+
+    del bprop
+    print 'pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet bprop inputs:', (bprop_X_flops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
     del sharedX
     del sharedY

diff --git a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py b/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py
index 9872d15..34399fb 100644
--- a/theano/pylearn2_benchmark.py

@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ from pylearn2.models.mlp import ConvElemwise, ConvNonlinearity, MLP

 from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.filter_acts import FilterActs
+from pylearn2.sandbox.cuda_convnet.weight_acts import WeightActs
 from theano.sandbox.cuda.basic_ops import gpu_contiguous
 
 
@@ -90,11 +91,13 @@ for i in range(5):
     inputBatch = np.random.randn(bs, ni, ih, iw)
     sharedX = theano.shared(inputBatch.astype('float32'))
     sharedY = theano.shared(np.random.randn(bs, no, (ih-kh)/dh+1, (iw-kw)/dw+1).astype('float32'))
+    sharedW = conv.layers[0].transformer.get_params()[0]
 
     X = theano.tensor.tensor4()
-
     Y = conv.fprop(X)
+    gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
 
+    # benchmark fprop Theano standard convolution
     fprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedY, Y)], on_unused_input='ignore')
 
     theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
@@ -104,11 +107,28 @@ for i in range(5):

     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
-    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise:', (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) / dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+    del fprop
+    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise fprop:', (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) / dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+
+    # benchmark bprop Theano standard convolution
+    bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedW, gW)], on_unused_input='ignore')
+
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    start = time.time()
+    for i in range(steps):
+        bprop()
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
+
+    del bprop
+    print 'pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop:', (0000 / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'  # TODO: GFLOP/s
+
 
     # Mimic Theano flag THEANO_FLAGS=optimizer_including=conv_fft_valid:conv_fft_full
     mode = theano.compile.get_default_mode()
     mode = mode.including('conv_fft_valid', 'conv_fft_full')
+
+    # benchmark fprop Theano FFT convolution
     fprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)],
                             updates=[(sharedY, Y)],
                             on_unused_input='ignore', mode=mode)
@@ -121,11 +141,28 @@ for i in range(5):
     tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
 
     del fprop
+    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise fprop:', (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) / dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
+
+    # benchmark bprop Theano FFT convolution
+    bprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)],
+                            updates=[(sharedW, gW)],
+                            on_unused_input='ignore', mode=mode)
+
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    start = time.time()
+    for i in range(steps):
+        bprop()
+    theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
+    tm = (time.time()-start)/steps
+
+    del bprop
+    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise bprop:', (0000 / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'  # TODO: GFLOP/s
+
     del sharedX
-    del conv
     del sharedY
+    del sharedW
+    del conv
 
-    print '(fft experimental) pylearn2.models.mlp.ConvElemwise:', (ni*no*kw*kh*(iw-kw+1)*(ih-kh+1) / dw/dh * bs * ops / tm / 1e9), 'GFLOP/s ( tm =', tm, ')'
 
     ### pylearn2 work-around for using cuda-convnet (http://benanne.github.io/2014/04/03/faster-convolutions-in-theano.html) ###
 
@@ -140,7 +177,10 @@ for i in range(5):
     contiguous_input = gpu_contiguous(sharedX)
     contiguous_filters = gpu_contiguous(sharedW)
     Y = conv_op(contiguous_input, contiguous_filters)
+    gW = theano.grad(None, wrt=sharedW, known_grads={Y: sharedY})
+    #gW = WeightActs()(contiguous_input, gpu_contiguous(sharedY), sharedW.shape)[0]  # constructed by hand, results in the same graph
 
+    # benchmark fprop cuda-convnet convolution
     fprop = theano.function([], [], givens=[(X, sharedX)], updates=[(sharedY, Y)], on_unused_input='ignore')
 
     theano.sandbox.cuda.synchronize()
@@ -151,9 +191,23 @@ for i in range(5):

diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 70e9708..52bf70e 100644

+* L3 - Input: `32x32`   Batch-size `128`, Feature maps: `128->128`,  Kernel Size:   `9x9`,  Stride: `1x1`
+* L4 - Input: `16x16`   Batch-size `128`, Feature maps: `128->128`,  Kernel Size:   `7x7`,  Stride: `1x1`
+* L5 - Input: `13x13`   Batch-size `128`, Feature maps: `384->384`,  Kernel Size:   `3x3`,  Stride: `1x1`
+* All times are in miliseconds.
+* The table is ranked according to the total time (L1 + L2 + L3 + L4 + L5)
+
